Video.summary: Today we meet Mish who is on the lookout for her forever home. She is looking for a home perfect for entertaining. But will Viviana be able to find her a place that fits her style?
Video.title: Saratoga

Video.summary: Hiram & Julissa are about to get married and are looking for a larger home for their merging step-family. They’re about to see three amazing properties in Orange County, California.
Video.title: Moving to California

Video.summary: We meet Johnny and Jenny who are searching for a luxury home. Viviana is taking them through some of the most beautiful mega mansions in Los Angeles, California. They need a house with the perfect entertaining space.
Video.title: Hollywood Hills

Video.summary: Gea and David are looking for more space. They’re visiting some of the most desirable properties in Cupertino, California. Will they find their dream home?
Video.title: Looking to Expand

Video.summary: Will the sites and sounds of Venice, CA lure Lee and Bourke into finding their perfect abode? Will Viviana be able to help them to find exactly what she is looking for?
Video.title: Venice Canals

Video.summary: Today we meet Cory; he is looking to surprise his wife with their dream home and they need enough room to grow their family.
Video.title: Cory

Video.summary: Cyndi and David are East Coast millionaires looking to taste the West Coast lifestyle. They will see three fabulous homes in Yorba Linda in Orange County. One of them is a 6-bedroom home with a 100-foot waterslide!
Video.title: West Coast Good Life

Video.summary: Carol is a salon owner who is looking to relocate with her husband and expand her business to Southern California and have plenty of room for the grandkids. She’s about to see three properties in Pacific Palisades.
Video.title: Pacific Palisades

Video.summary: We meet million-dollar house hunters Erika & Sonny. They just moved from Chicago and are looking for the perfect Orange County home for their family. Will these Chicago transplants find the perfect West Coast home?
Video.title: Orange County Luxury

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Arsi & Madeleine tour three luxury properties in Playa Vista, CA.
Video.title: Playa Vista Luxury

Video.summary: We meet Michael and Kelly who are in search for a luxury home. Viviana is taking them through some the most beautiful mega mansions in Montecito and Santa Barbara, California.
Video.title: Santa Barbara

Video.summary: Darren and Meg are relocating from the East Coast. They’re looking for better weather year round. They’re visiting some of the most desirable properties in Pasadena, California. Will they find their dream home?
Video.title: From the East Coast to Pasadena

Image.alt: From the East Coast to Pasadena
From the East Coast to Pasadena
From the East Coast to Pasadena

Video.summary: Arica and Sean are relocating from San Francisco. They’re visiting some of the most desirable properties in Orange County, California. Will they find their dream home?
Video.title: San Francisco to Los Angeles

Video.summary: Robert and Simone search for their ideal home in vibrant Venice Beach, CA, navigating beachside properties in pursuit of a million-dollar sanctuary by the sea.
Video.title: Venice Beach Escape

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Kyle and Jess tour three luxury properties in Orange County, CA.
Video.title: Loving Laguna

Video.summary: Today is all about Candice, who is looking for the perfect home for her and her new husband in Los Gatos, California. Candice is looking to build a family in her forever home. Will she find what she is looking for?
Video.title: Candice

Video.summary: Steven is looking for a place to spend his weekends that will accommodate his love of Motor Sports. Viviana is taking him through some of the most desirable properties in this one of kind Motor Sports Country Club.
Video.title: Thermal

Video.summary: Kevin and Danielle are looking for a home for their growing family. They’re visiting some of the most desirable properties in Pasadena, California. Will they find their dream home?
Video.title: Making Room for a Growing Family

Image.alt: Making Room for a Growing Family
Making Room for a Growing Family
Making Room for a Growing Family

Video.summary: We meet Alysia, an attorney looking to escape the cold wet weather of Seattle for the desert sunshine of Palm Springs. She’s about to see three luxury properties in La Quinta, California.
Video.title: Palm Springs Sunshine

Video.summary: Pamela and William delve into the charming community of Sherman Oaks, aiming to find a character-filled home that captures their hearts.
Video.title: Sherman Oaks Charmer

Video.summary: Today, meet Fleet Easton, he is the Crown Prince of Palm Springs. He’s a singer & dancer who has worked hard and is now ready to buy his dream home. Watch the process and see which one of these desert dwellings will seal the deal.
Video.title: Desert Luxury

Video.summary: Tyler is leaving Los Angeles to expand his business. He’s visiting some of the most desirable properties in Silicon Valley, California. Will he find his dream home?
Video.title: Expanding the Business

Video.summary: Follow Steve and Linda as they escape the cold of the East Coast and hunt for their sunny hideaway in Los Angeles. Will they find their winter escape?
Video.title: Winter Hideaway

Video.summary: Today's episode is all about Jim and Cheryl. Jim and Cheryl are looking to retire into their dream home close to their family. Will Encino CA have what they are after?
Video.title: Family calling

Video.summary: We meet John and Laura, a couple who are in search of a luxury home. Viviana takes them through some of the most beautiful mega mansions in Montecito, California.
Video.title: Montecito

Video.summary: We meet husband and wife duo, Leanne & Michael. They are looking for a coastal home in Orange County, California now that their children have grown. Which one of these seaside sanctuaries will be the one?
Video.title: A House by the Sea

Video.summary: Today on Million Dollar Dream Home, we meet Kathleen, a big time Hollywood producer who is looking to make the move to Beverly Hills, looking at luxury properties in the 90210.
Video.title: Beverly Hills Luxury

Video.summary: Steve and Natalie are east-coast transplants looking for the quintessential California lifestyle. We’re about to see three amazing properties in Manhattan Beach and Redondo Beach.
Video.title: Quintessential California Life

Video.summary: Kathy and her husband John are relocating from New York City to sunny California. They’re looking for a house that’s closer to their family. Will they find their dream home?
Video.title: Relocating from New York City to Sunny California

Image.alt: Relocating from New York City to Sunny California
Relocating from New York City to Sunny California
Relocating from New York City to Sunny California

Video.summary: Kristina and Moe embark on an enchanting journey through Encino, CA, in search of an elegant and spacious million-dollar home.
Video.title: Encino Enchantment

Video.summary: Serena is leaving Seattle for life on the beach. She’s visiting some of the most desirable properties in Manhattan Beach, California. Will she find her dream home?
Video.title: Beach Living

Video.summary: Kat is looking to find a luxury home near the beach, so Viviana is taking her through some of the most desirable properties in Manhattan Beach, California.
Video.title: Manhattan Beach

Video.summary: Today, we meet million dollar house hunters Patrick and Pol. Stay tuned! They have three luxury properties to check out on this Million Dollar Malibu House Hunt. From modern to traditional, will these homes tick the right boxes?
Video.title: Malibu Magic

Video.summary: We meet married couple Henri and Chris who are in search of a luxury desert home. They need a house with the modern conveniences and a house to entertain at.
Video.title: Palm Springs

Video.summary: Today we meet Dee and her friend Terry. Dee is looking for a luxury home for her family and growing business. Viviana takes her through some beautiful homes around Los Angeles. Will Dee find what she is looking for?
Video.title: Dee and Her Friend Terry

Video.summary: We meet Ziba, a stay-at-home enterpriser. She is looking for the perfect home for her and her husband. They see a beautiful modern home in Luxury Bel Air with stunning views and all the bells and whistles.
Video.title: Bel Air Sophistication

Video.summary: Today we meet Amber and Kareem. They’re looking to find a luxury home that’s closer to his office and near the beach in the Irvine, Newport & Laguna Beach areas.
Video.title: Orange County

Video.summary: We meet million dollar house hunters, Gus and Matthew. Gus is looking to move from the hustle and bustle of West Hollywood. They’re about to see three prime Pacific Palisades properties.
Video.title: Escape West Hollywood

Video.summary: Talia and Ricarda tour Westwood and Century City, uncovering luxurious condos and prestigious estates in pursuit of their million-dollar dream residence.
Video.title: City Living, Westwood Style

Video.summary: Tania is looking for a larger home for her and her boyfriend. She will tour three stunning homes in Cupertino, California. Will Viviana be able to help Tania find the perfect home?
Video.title: Tania

Video.summary: Today we meet Clair and Monte. They are looking for an entertainer's home by the beach. Viviana takes them through three amazing properties in Manhattan Beach. Will Viviana help them find what they are looking for?
Video.title: Clair and Monte

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Lulu & Dave tour three luxury properties in Palm Springs, CA.
Video.title: Palm Springs Paradise

Video.summary: We meet Alex who is on the lookout for his forever home. Viviana is taking him through some of the most beautiful properties in Santa Barbara, California.
Video.title: Santa Barbara

Video.summary: We meet Dr Toni, an L.A.-based celebrity chiropractor looking for a luxurious home In Park City, Utah. He wants a home large enough to host parties for family and friends. But he also wants a quiet retreat to relax.
Video.title: Park City, Utah

Video.summary: Caitlin and Chris are recently engaged and searching for their perfect luxury home in around Santa Monica, California.
Video.title: Caitlin and Chris

Video.summary: Melissa and Judy venture into exclusive Calabasas, seeking a glamorous and private million-dollar residence. Will they find their haven in Calabasas?
Video.title: Calabasas Haven

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Lizzie and Martin tour three luxury properties in Manhattan and Redondo Beach.
Video.title: Beach House Hunt

Video.summary: Natalie and Dylan are looking to settle down in the Valley of Los Angeles. Will their big plans be undone by the hills of LA? Will Viviana help them find what they are looking for?
Video.title: Valley of Dreams

Video.summary: Today we follow James and Tricia as they house hunt around Encino, CA. Will they find their forever home? Let’s see if Viviana can help them find the perfect home.
Video.title: Hidden Hills

Video.summary: Adam and Mindy explore the San Fernando Valley, seeking a family-friendly house that balances tranquility with urban amenities. Will they discover their ideal home in the valley?
Video.title: Valley Vistas

Video.summary: John is ready to trade up Bay Area living for the beach. He’s about to see three amazing properties in Orange County, CA.
Video.title: Heading To the Beach

Video.summary: Gordon and Carmen are looking for their perfect home by the water in Orange County, California as a getaway from their busy life. Let’s see if Viviana can help them find the perfect beach home.
Video.title: Gordon and Carmen

Video.summary: Ruthanne and Lynn search for coastal luxury and million-dollar splendor in the picturesque neighborhoods of Venice and Santa Monica. Will they discover their dream coastal home?
Video.title: Coastal Delights
